title: Berlin TV Tower - Quick Summary
items: **The TV Tower is worth it only in clear weather:** the observation deck is 203 meters high, so visibility matters more than almost anything else.
**Official standard tickets start around EUR 28.50:** it is a real splurge by Berlin standards, especially for couples or families.
**Skip it if you mainly want photos of the tower:** the best TV Tower photos are from outside, especially Liebknecht Bridge or Park Inn rooftop.
**The Reichstag dome is the best free alternative:** it requires advance registration, but the view and political context are excellent.
**The tower story is better from the street:** the GDR built it as a showpiece, then Berliners nicknamed the cross reflection Pope's Revenge.
